title: Quantitative Market Research Intern
description: 5-month internship (Aug/Sep 2026 start) in quantitative market research teams at Ipsos Denmark. Work across Innovation, Creative Excellence, Brand Health Tracking, or Market Strategy. Assist with questionnaire testing, data analysis, client reports. Requires analytical mindset, Excel/PowerPoint proficiency, curiosity. DKK 3770/month, potential for permanent employment.
match_reasons: Internship level matches experience|Quantitative analysis background (DTU, Novo Nordisk)|3-month IQVIA consulting internship (market research, client delivery)|Excel/PowerPoint proficiency|Analytical mindset, curiosity, proactive attitude|Available now (graduated March 2026)
gaps: Limited market research experience (only 3 months)|No brand tracking or innovation testing experience|Internship compensation vs. full-time salary expectations
